cast-fail: You are missing something to cast that...
cast-fail-toosoon: You are still tired from the last spell, slow down!
nodsc: This spell has no lang describing it! Is the Attribute 'langCode' set?
makestickdsc: Casts a projectile that turns Leaves into Sticks in a 3x3x3 area where it lands.
healotherdsc: Casts a projectile that heals the target, or the nearest to its landing point, 2.5 HP over 5 seconds.
grouphealdsc: Heal yourself, and any nearby players, for 2.5 + 0.5 health per extra target, over 5 seconds.
windstoredsc: When activated while sneaking: Mark a location in the world. Otherwise: Send all items in a 2 block radius from landing point to location, or the inventory there, if possible.
ignitespelldsc: Casts a projectile that ignites what it hits. Charcoal pits, pitkilns, or unfortunate creatures. Does no direct damage.
fertilizespelldsc: Tries to give 5% N,K,and P to the farmland you are targeting, or the farmland under the crop you are targeting. Ignores NKP cap.
airboltdsc: A simple Projectile spell. Has a very small AOE if you miss.
airsurgedsc: A simple Projectile spell. Has a small AOE if you miss. Moderate damage.
airblastdsc: A simple Projectile spell. Has a large AOE if you miss. Heavy damage.
fireboltdsc: A simple Projectile spell. Has a very small AOE if you miss.
firesurgedsc: A simple Projectile spell. Has a small AOE if you miss. Moderate damage.
fireblastdsc: A simple Projectile spell. Has a large AOE if you miss. Heavy damage.
earthboltdsc: A simple Projectile spell. Has a very small AOE if you miss.
earthsurgedsc: A simple Projectile spell. Has a small AOE if you miss. Moderate damage.
earthblastdsc: A simple Projectile spell. Has a large AOE if you miss. Heavy damage.
waterboltdsc: A simple Projectile spell. Has a very small AOE if you miss.
watersurgedsc: A simple Projectile spell. Has a small AOE if you miss. Moderate damage.
waterblastdsc: A simple Projectile spell. Has a large AOE if you miss. Heavy damage.
CommentRunes: I CBA to add proper handbook integration for recipes, so, if you change the recipes, update the lang, kay? kay.
itemdesc-rune-water: Made with raw fish, fishbones, or ice in varying amounts.
itemdesc-rune-air: Made with any base game flour.
itemdesc-rune-fire: Made with charcoal or coal. Better burnables craft more runes.
itemdesc-rune-earth: Made with any stones. Rocks can craft more per item.
itemdesc-rune-soul: Made with a temporal gear; one makes 16.
itemdesc-rune-balance: Made with quartz, with crushed being more efficient.
itemdesc-rune-rust: Made with Rusty Gears. Makes a few per gear
itemdesc-rune-alpha: Made with firewood. Aged is more efficient.
itemdesc-rune-beta: Made with raw copper nuggets,like malachite.
itemdesc-rune-gamma: Made with raw iron nuggets, like magnetite.
hbrunes-text:
Casting And Selecting Spells
Casting and selecting spells are done with the keybind. By default, ALT + F will bring up your spell menu, and X will cast the spell, or try to.

Making Runes:
Runes are made by placing blank runes into a Rune Altar, throwing the necissary ingredients nearby, and Sneak + Rclicking with a stick.
If you don't have enough blank runes in the altar, the craft will fail.

Elemental Types:
There are four types of elemental spell. When dealing damage, keep the following in mind:
Fire spells will ignite their immediate target, and deal some more damage.
Earth spells deal the most raw damage.
Water spells slightly heal the caster on hit.
Air spells deal much more knockback.
